backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Trip, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app, including role-based access control for customers, drivers, and admins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of the `/admin/upgrade` frontend route, listing affected files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes in each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Namma Driver Pilot' that mounts the React app into a root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration with role-based route guards for customer, driver, and admin dashboards, plus a login-only `/admin/upgrade` route rendering AdminUpgradePage.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin UI tab showing a searchable, scrollable table of all trips with customer/driver emails, formatted pickup/dropoff locations, status badges, and creation dates.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable, scrollable table of all users with their email, full name, role (color-coded badge), and join date fetched via `useGetAllUsers`.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Lists available requested trips for drivers with pickup/dropoff locations and a button to accept each trip using `useAcceptTrip`.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of the current customer's trips with location details and color-coded status badges fetched via `useGetMyTrips`.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Displays a driver's profile card (service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, languages, earnings) with an edit button and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Shows a driver's trips with status badges and a 'Mark as Completed' button for accepted trips, using `useGetMyTrips` and `useCompleteTrip`.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form component for editing a driver's profile including service pincode, area name, vehicle experience checkboxes, transmission comfort, languages, and availability toggle.
Dialog modal wrapper that renders `EditDriverProfileForm` for updating a driver's profile, only shown when a valid `userProfile` is provided.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component that wraps pages with a `Navigation` header and a footer crediting caffeine.ai, using a flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar component that shows the app logo and a user dropdown menu with role-based dashboard navigation and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to enter their email and full name to create an initial profile without a role assigned yet.
Form component for customers to create a trip request, supporting local/outstation trip types, manual/GPS pickup location, vehicle selection, and duration input.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: Modal that prompts authenticated users to permanently select their role (customer, driver, or admin via a secret code) and navigates to the appropriate dashboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor using React Query, exposing loading and fetched states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, role management, admin upgrade, and trip creation/retrieval operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes using earth tones and warm greens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying logged-in identity info, aggregate stats (total users/trips), and tabbed views for managing users and trips.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page with a form allowing a user to enter a secret setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page showing a ride request form and a list of the customer's past/current trips side by side.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page displaying the driver's profile, an editable profile modal, and tabbed views for available trips and the driver's accepted trips.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with a hero section and login button that redirects authenticated users to their role-appropriate dashboard after profile fetch completes.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: React page that checks the authenticated user's profile and redirects them to the appropriate role-based dashboard (admin/driver/customer), or shows a RoleSelectionWarningModal if no role is set yet.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist/retrieve them via sessionStorage and remove sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, fonts, accordion animations, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the existing role-based app and two pending tasks: adding a hidden /admin/upgrade frontend route and a backend upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin function that grants admin role when code 'NAMMA5600' is provided.
